mapper.select: SELECT notification_id AS notificationId, type_code AS typeCode, title AS title, message AS message, target_year AS targetYear, target_month AS targetMonth, target_week_of_month AS targetWeekOfMonth, draw_no AS drawNo, read_yn AS readYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM app_notification WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} ORDER BY created_at DESC, notification_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_notification WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} AND read_yn = 'N'

SELECT notification_id AS notificationId, user_seq AS userSeq, type_code AS typeCode, title AS title, message AS message, target_year AS targetYear, target_month AS targetMonth, target_week_of_month AS targetWeekOfMonth, draw_no AS drawNo, read_yn AS readYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM app_notification WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} AND type_code = 'RESULT_READY' AND target_year = #{targetYear} AND target_month = #{targetMonth} AND target_week_of_month = #{targetWeekOfMonth} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_notification ( user_seq, type_code, title, message, target_year, target_month, target_week_of_month, draw_no ) VALUES ( #{userSeq}, #{typeCode}, #{title}, #{message}, #{targetYear}, #{targetMonth}, #{targetWeekOfMonth}, #{drawNo} )
